task_completion.description: Agent accessed the Odoo instance at http://localhost:8069.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open showing the Odoo login screen or the main Odoo app dashboard with the URL localhost:8069.
The Odoo Employees app interface is visible, showing a grid or list of employee profile cards.

task_completion.description: Agent located and opened the profile for 'Anita Oliver'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The detailed employee profile page specifically for 'Anita Oliver' is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Agent triggered the Print Badge action for the employee.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Print' dropdown menu is open with 'Print Badge' selected, a download notification for a badge PDF is visible, or a PDF viewer is showing the generated Odoo ID badge.

task_completion.description: Agent saved or moved the downloaded badge file to /home/ga/badge.pdf.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog saving the file as 'badge.pdf' in the '/home/ga' directory, a file manager showing 'badge.pdf' in the Home folder, or a terminal window showing a command like 'mv ~/Downloads/*badge*.pdf ~/badge.pdf'.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Odoo web interface to generate the badge.
integrity.visual_evidence: Standard Odoo 17 UI elements (purple header, breadcrumbs, employee forms) are visible in a web browser, rather than a mocked interface or text editor.

integrity.description: The badge PDF was generated via Odoo's built-in print function, not created manually.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen clicking the Odoo 'Print' menu, or the resulting PDF (if visible) features the standard Odoo badge layout (employee photo, name, and barcode/QR code).

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser to navigate Odoo, not backend database scripts or API calls.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser windows show the step-by-step GUI navigation to find the employee and print the badge, rather than terminal commands executing python or psql scripts to extract data.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires interacting with Odoo 17 HR at http://localhost:8069. The target employee is 'Anita Oliver' (Department: R&D USA, Job Title: Experienced Developer). The badge is generated as a PDF and typically downloads to /home/ga/Downloads. The final file must be saved or moved to exactly /home/ga/badge.pdf.
